note "接口隔离原则" as note1
class "Interface1" as I1 {
    +operation1():void
}
class "Interface2" as I2 {
    +operation2():void
    +operation3():void
}
class "Interface3" as I3 {
    +operation4():void
    +operation5():void
}
class "A" as A
class "B" as B
class "C" as C
class "D" as D
A ..> I2
A ..> I1
B ..> I2
B ..> I1
C ..> I1
C ..> I3
D ..> I1
D ..> I3
note1 -[hidden]- I1
@enduml
